Bu anlamlı buluşmanın finans sektörümüz başta olmak üzere ülkemiz, milletimiz ve ekonomimiz için hayırlara vesile olmasını diliyorum.

social.text:
La France investit pour son avenir.

1,5 milliards d’euros pour le quantique et pour les semi-conducteurs. Avec France 2030, nous renforçons notre souveraineté, nos talents et nos capacités d’innovation.

L’Europe doit être à la hauteur de cette révolution technologique.

Video

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
Nine years on from the Manchester Arena terror attack, my thoughts are with those who lost their lives, the survivors, and their loved ones.

Last year I was proud to deliver on my promise to Figen Murray to introduce Martyn’s Law, in memory of her son Martyn Hett.

Martyn’s Law

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
Be like El Salvador🇸🇻

拥有638万人口的国家萨尔瓦多，90%是印第安人与西班牙人混血后裔。我想，是不是萨尔瓦多的人民大多数都有常识智商够高并有远见，2019年选出了这么好的年轻有为的总统Nayib Bukele，带领国家一步步回归法律秩序，稳定繁荣。

如果萨尔瓦多人民可以做到，为什么我们澳洲人民不可以？

如果你有常识、智商不低、眼光放长远，请选择一国党。


Nayib Bukele (@nayibbukele)

The next step is to go from being a safe country to beco

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
Bukele’s reform project is fascinating to watch. He’ll become a mythical transformative leader or a tragic figure of hubris, and I’m curious to see how it plays out. I hope he can also pivot back to the ambitious Bitcoin-centric vision he previously promised.
